name: Standard
summary: Basic ground with no movement penalty.
description: Standard terrain covers any basic kind of ground that confers no advantage or disadvantage. Movement over this terrain costs a single point of Speed, and all units may traverse it without any problems.

name: Uneasy
summary: Hard to walk on; costs +1 Speed to enter.
description: Uneasy Terrain is anywhere your characters would have a hard time walking without stumbling or taking their time—thick mud, hellstreams, soulbrick, etc. Uneasy Terrain costs +1 Speed to move into.

name: Impassable
summary: Cannot be entered unless a game effect allows it.
description: Impassable Terrain can only be entered if a specific game effect allows it, and only for as long as that effect allows it.

name: Cover
summary: Units here gain Cover (−1 damage from attacks targeting them).
description: Units in Cover terrain gain the Cover effect, taking -1 damage from any attacks targeting them.

name: Obstacle
summary: Impassable, breaks line of sight, can be attacked and destroyed.
description: Obstacle is Impassable, breaks Line of Sight, and can be targeted by attacks. HP is written inside the symbol; if no HP is listed, it breaks after one hit. Consider how many turns it would take a HELLPIERCER to break when placing Obstacles; a basic attack deals somewhere around 15 damage, for reference.

name: Void
summary: Impassable; entering causes instant death. Replaces all other terrain when created.
description: Void is Impassable, but units can be pushed into it. Entering Void causes instant death. When this terrain type is created, it instantly removes all other terrain on that space, leaving only Void.
